1.name: Linh Anh
1.text: I improved by 1.0 band in 8 weeks thanks to the clear roadmap.

2.name: Mr. Quang
2.text: The class dashboard saves me a lot of time every week.

3.name: Parent An
3.text: Tracking my child’s progress is much easier now.

1.a: Yes. You can start with a trial account to explore the interface and learning paths.

2.a: NamThuEdu supports students, university learners, and working adults with tailored paths.

3.q: Is there a dedicated teacher dashboard?
3.a: Yes. The teacher portal supports class management, test creation, and progress tracking.
